input_text: 反贪污委员会（SPRM）提供了多种举报渠道，包括网上投诉。如果发现贪腐行为，勇敢站出来举报，法律会保护举报人的安全。

input_text: I love how people say 'support local' but then go buy everything from China on Shopee because it's RM2 cheaper. Hypocrites. No wonder our economy is suffering

input_text: The school bus picks up my child at 6 AM but school starts at 7:30 AM. Kids are forced to wait 1.5 hours at school doing nothing.
reason: School bus schedule forcing children to wait 1.5 hours before class starts.

input_text: Neighbour always park in front of my house. Ask nicely also no use. These people have no common sense.

input_text: Malaysian celebrities think they're Hollywood stars. Same recycled content, zero talent, just pretty faces and sponsors. Pathetic.

input_text: Just received message say RON95 going up to RM5. Not sure true or not but better full tank now just in case bro.

input_text: These online sellers so dishonest one. Product received totally different from picture. Should ban them all.

reason: Singles out Indonesian workers specifically for noise complaints. Ethnicises a neighbourhood nuisance issue.
suggested_rewrite: Late-night noise is a valid concern. Residents should lodge complaints with management, who can enforce quiet hours for all tenants equally.

input_text: Malaysian men on dating apps: first message already ask for photo without hijab. Pervert ke apa? Takde adab langsung lelaki sekarang.
reason: Generalising all Malaysian men on dating apps as perverts, hostile characterisation based on individual bad behaviour.
suggested_rewrite: Some users on dating apps send inappropriate messages. Platforms should enforce better moderation and users should practice respectful communication.

input_text: Nak complaint kat KPDNHEP pun form satu mile panjang. By the time siap, dah malas nak complain. System designed to discourage complaints ke?
reason: Implies the complaint system is deliberately designed to deter complainants, a cynical accusation.
suggested_rewrite: Proses aduan pengguna perlu dipermudahkan. KPDNHEP boleh introduce simplified online forms dan faster response times untuk galakkan rakyat melaporkan masalah.

input_text: Boss aku ni memang toxic. Suruh kerja overtime every day tapi bonus takde. Exploitation namanya tu. Manusia macam ni patut kena karma.
reason: Wishes karma on the boss, crossing from valid labour complaint into personal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Pekerja yang diminta kerja overtime tanpa pampasan sewajarnya boleh membuat aduan kepada Jabatan Tenaga Kerja. Hak pekerja dilindungi di bawah undang-undang buruh Malaysia.

input_text: Perempuan Melayu sekarang ni, nak kahwin lambat sebab nak enjoy life konon. Nanti tua menyesal sorang-sorang. I'm just saying the truth that nobody wants to hear
reason: Targets Malay women specifically for marrying late, using a 'just stating truth' disclaimer to justify the judgment. Combines ethnic and gender stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap orang has the right to choose when to get married. Some prioritise career or personal growth first. We should respect individual choices tanpa menghakimi.

input_text: Anak dia study design kat college. Habis duit parents for nothing la. Better go learn coding or something useful.
reason: Calls design studies a waste of parents' money in mixed Malay-English, dismissing creative education.
suggested_rewrite: Design is a growing field with many career opportunities. Both creative and technical skills are valuable in today's economy.

input_text: Ada orang share dalam group WhatsApp kata expat Korea kat KL tak bayar rent and run away. Banyak tuan rumah kena. Is this a trend? Seram la if true
reason: Amplifies an unverified WhatsApp rumour targeting Korean expats specifically. The 'is this a trend?' question elevates individual claims to a pattern without evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Heard some claims about tenants skipping rent in KL. This can happen with anyone. Landlords should always use proper tenancy agreements and collect deposits regardless of tenant background.

input_text: Tabung Haji punya investment strategy macam main judi. Duit orang tua nak haji pun boleh rugi berbilion. Seriously, who's accountable?
reason: Compares Tabung Haji investments to gambling. Emotionally charged mixed language criticism of religious savings institution.
suggested_rewrite: Strategi pelaburan Tabung Haji perlu lebih berhati-hati dan telus. Akauntabiliti penting untuk mengekalkan kepercayaan pendeposit.

input_text: My family WhatsApp group ah, every day ada new forward saying prices going up. Semalam beras, hari ni telur, esok apa? They believe everything also one.
reason: Mixed-language mockery of family for believing daily unverified price increase forwards. Highlights misinformation problem.
suggested_rewrite: Daily unverified messages about price increases cause unnecessary worry. Encourage family to check official sources before believing.

input_text: This kopitiam uncle charge me RM8 for kopi. Robbery in broad daylight. See my face tourist is it? Typical la, see can cheat then cheat.
reason: Accusing kopitiam owner of being a cheat, hostile language ('robbery'), overly aggressive response to pricing.
suggested_rewrite: The coffee price at this kopitiam seemed unusually high. Clear pricing displayed on the menu would help avoid misunderstandings.

input_text: Nak renew roadtax pun kena queue berjam-jam. Online system crash every time. Government IT memang level kampung.
reason: Mocks government IT as village-level, a dismissive and rude characterisation of digital services.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem dalam talian kerajaan perlu lebih stabil dan reliable. Investment in better IT infrastructure boleh reduce queue times dan improve user experience.

input_text: Gomen cakap nak tolong B40 tapi reality semua projek masuk poket kroni je la bro
reason: Mixed-language cynical accusation of government cronyism in B40 aid programs. Legitimate concern expressed with contempt.
suggested_rewrite: Government B40 aid programs should have clearer oversight to ensure the funds reach those who need them most.

input_text: Tinder kat Malaysia ni full of catfish. Girls pakai gambar 10 tahun lepas, jumpa lain macam. At least be honest la, waste my time only.
reason: Dismissive generalisation about women on Tinder as catfish, rude and demeaning characterisation.
suggested_rewrite: Online dating profiles don't always match reality. Honesty in profiles would make the experience better for everyone.

input_text: Nak guna tandas OKU pun kena kunci. Pergi cari guard, guard pergi entah mana. Disabled people not welcome ke?
reason: Disabled toilet access issue with locked facilities and absent guards, accessibility complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Disabled-friendly facilities should be easily accessible at all times. Building management should ensure OKU toilets are unlocked or use a universal key system.

input_text: Ustaz kat TV tu ceramah pasal sabar tapi dalam WhatsApp group kutuk orang lain. Someone leaked the screenshots. Hipokrit betul.
reason: Endorses the leaking of private messages to expose a religious figure while using it to attack religious leaders generally.
suggested_rewrite: Tokoh agama perlu mengamalkan apa yang diajarkan. However, leaking private conversations is a privacy violation regardless of who is involved.

input_text: Kalau orang India complain pasal kuil kena roboh, sure kena label as anti-national. 但华人庙被拆的时候也一样没人管。双重标准。
reason: Frames temple demolition complaints as evidence of systemic double standards across ethnic lines using BM-Chinese-English code-switching.
suggested_rewrite: Isu rumah ibadat memerlukan penyelesaian yang adil untuk semua komuniti。通过法律途径和社区对话可以更有效地解决这些问题。

input_text: Malas la nak deal with JKR people. Everything kena bayar under table baru jalan. Corrupt habis system ni.
reason: Accuses JKR staff of systematic corruption as established fact without evidence, using BM-English code-switching.
suggested_rewrite: Jika terdapat pengalaman rasuah di mana-mana jabatan kerajaan, laporan boleh dibuat kepada SPRM. Proper documentation strengthens any complaint.

input_text: Orang Penang memang famous kedekut, even in the office also calculate who owes who 50 sen. Come on la, it's just 50 sen.
reason: Perpetuates the stingy Penangite stereotype with a specific workplace anecdote. Mixed language inter-state prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Penang dikenali cermat dengan kewangan, yang sebenarnya sifat positif. Kita tak patut jadikan ia bahan ejekan.

input_text: Orang Kedah semua nak cakap besar tapi kerja tak seberapa. Bukan nak stereotype tapi memang nampak pattern la.
reason: Self-aware stereotyping of Kedah people that still perpetuates prejudice despite the disclaimer.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap individu berbeza tanpa mengira asal negeri. Menilai seseorang berdasarkan stereotip tidaklah adil.

input_text: Nak dapatkan surat pengesahan dari jabatan kerajaan pun ambil masa 2 bulan. Padahal cuma cop dan sign je.
reason: Two-month wait for a government verification letter that just needs a stamp and signature.
suggested_rewrite: Proses pengesahan dokumen kerajaan perlu dipercepat. Sistem digital dan tandatangan elektronik boleh mengurangkan masa pemprosesan.

input_text: JPJ officer tu memang nak duit kopi je. Tahan kereta sikit-sikit pun nak saman. Kalau bagi RM50 terus lepas. Semua orang tau dah.
reason: Accusing all JPJ officers of bribery based on generalised claim. 'Semua orang tau' is unsubstantiated.
suggested_rewrite: Terdapat dakwaan rasuah dalam kalangan pegawai penguatkuasa. Jika ada bukti, laporan perlu dibuat kepada SPRM.

input_text: Orang PPR beli kereta baru tapi rumah bersepah. Memang la B40 selama-lamanya kalau perangai macam ni.
reason: Judges PPR residents' spending and implies they deserve to remain in poverty.

input_text: Delivery rider lalu lorong belakang rumah macam Mat Rempit. Langgar kucing jiran hari tu, memang tak ada otak.
reason: Calls delivery riders brainless and compares them to Mat Rempit, a derogatory generalisation.

input_text: Lampu isyarat kat simpang ni rosak setiap minggu. Setiap kali repair, setiap kali rosak balik. Buang duit rakyat.
reason: Traffic light repeatedly breaking and being repaired, wasting public money.

input_text: Kos pengebumian pun dah naik mendadak. Tanah kubur mahal, upacara mahal. Nak mati pun kena bayar banyak.

input_text: Kos makan tengah hari dah RM15 sehari. Sebulan tu RM450 untuk makan tengah hari je. Gaji minimum tak cover pun.
reason: Lunch cost calculation showing minimum wage inadequacy, daily struggle.

input_text: Technician TM datang lambat 3 jam. Pastu cakap kabel ok, masalah kat server. Alasan je memanjang.
reason: Accuses TM technician of making excuses and being unpunctual, generalising poor service.

input_text: Budak zaman sekarang memang pemalas. Kerja sikit dah nak resign. Snowflake betul generasi ni.
reason: Ageist generalisation labelling younger generation as lazy and fragile. Dismissive of legitimate workplace concerns.

input_text: Diorang ni buat rumah ibadat kat tengah-tengah kawasan perumahan, lepas tu nak expect orang tak complain pasal bunyi. Logik ke?
reason: Frustrated complaint about places of worship in residential areas with dismissive tone toward religious communities.
suggested_rewrite: Perancangan rumah ibadat di kawasan perumahan perlu mengambil kira keselesaan penduduk. Dialog antara pihak berkuasa dan jemaah boleh membantu.

input_text: Haih, orang Malaysia ni memang suka buang sampah merata. Tak bertamadun langsung.
reason: Frustrated environmental complaint calling Malaysians 'uncivilized' for littering, rude generalization.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah pembuangan sampah di Malaysia memerlukan perhatian. Kempen kesedaran dan penguatkuasaan yang lebih ketat boleh membantu mengubah tabiat ini.

input_text: Awek tu hitam gelap macam arang tapi nak jadi influencer. Confidence lebih la tu.
reason: Colourism and body shaming, mocking dark skin while dismissing someone's ambition. Deeply normalised toxicity in Malaysian context.

input_text: Tak payah la nak defend kerajaan. Semua orang tahu diorang makan rasuah. Bukti dah bertimbun tapi masih deny.

input_text: Subsidi minyak asyik potong je tapi gaji menteri tak pernah turun. Rakyat makan pasir la macam ni.

input_text: Dah berapa kali report longkang tersumbat tapi masih sama. Nyamuk bertelur kat situ, nanti denggi baru nak bertindak.

input_text: Orang dari kelantan ni memang pelik sikit. Cakap pun orang tak faham, nak buat macam mana.

suggested_rewrite: Loghat Kelantan memang unik dan kadang-kadang sukar difahami oleh orang dari negeri lain. Kepelbagaian bahasa adalah kekayaan budaya kita.

input_text: Nak renew insurans motor online pun kena call agent. Agent caj extra RM50 untuk 'perkhidmatan'. Haram jadah betul.
reason: Forced to use agent for motorcycle insurance renewal with extra charge.

input_text: Pekerja cashier tu bodoh ke apa, scan barang pun tak betul, buang masa aku je
reason: Insulting a cashier as stupid over a scanning error. Rude personal attack on service worker.
suggested_rewrite: Cashier tu tersalah scan beberapa barang, harap pihak kedai boleh perbaiki sistem.

input_text: Peniaga pasar malam sekarang semua penipu. Jual barang tiruan letak harga mahal. Orang biasa macam kita ni memang kena kencing je la.
reason: Labels all night market traders as fraudsters selling counterfeits, damaging an entire livelihood sector.

input_text: Fresh grad dapat gaji RM2500 tapi sewa bilik RM800, loan kereta RM600, PTPTN RM400. Baki tinggal RM700 untuk makan sebulan.
reason: Detailed breakdown showing fresh graduate barely surviving on RM2500 salary.

input_text: Penghantaran barang JnT ni memang slow. Parcel sampai seminggu lambat. Customer service pun tak boleh trace.
reason: Courier service delay and inability to track parcels, consumer frustration.
suggested_rewrite: Kelewatan penghantaran boleh dilaporkan melalui aplikasi kurier. Untuk barangan bernilai tinggi, pertimbangkan insurans penghantaran.

input_text: Setiap kali nak guna pusat kesihatan komuniti kena bayar walaupun kad pengenalan punya. Konon servis percuma.
reason: Community health center charging fees despite supposedly free services for citizens.
suggested_rewrite: Klinik kesihatan kerajaan menawarkan rawatan pada caj minimal. Jika dicaj berlebihan, semak dengan pentadbiran tentang jadual bayaran rasmi.

input_text: Mesyuarat majlis perbandaran tu buang masa je. Ahli-ahli dia datang tidur, makan free, balik. Tak ada hasil pun.
reason: Dismisses local council meetings entirely as useless, mocking elected representatives without constructive critique.
suggested_rewrite: Mesyuarat majlis perbandaran perlu lebih telus dan produktif. Rakyat berhak mengetahui hasil perbincangan dan tindakan susulan yang diambil.

input_text: Kenapa gaji minimum kat Sabah dan Sarawak lebih rendah dari Semenanjung? Kos hidup kat sana pun tinggi jugak.
reason: Lower minimum wage in Sabah/Sarawak despite comparable cost of living.
suggested_rewrite: Perbezaan gaji minimum antara negeri perlu dikaji semula berdasarkan kos sara hidup sebenar. Pelarasan berkala penting untuk keadilan.

input_text: MBPJ ni wujud untuk apa sebenarnya? Longkang tersumbat sebulan dah report, takde sapa datang. Gaji buta je kerja dorang.

suggested_rewrite: Laporan longkang tersumbat telah dibuat sebulan lalu tetapi belum ada tindakan dari MBPJ. Harap perkara ini dapat disusuli segera.

reason: Condo guard house unmanned with gate always open despite security fees.

input_text: Telco company ni scammer betul, potong data tanpa bagi notis, menyampah betul
reason: Calling telco companies scammers without nuance. Rude consumer complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Syarikat telco patut beri notis sebelum memotong data. Perkhidmatan perlu lebih telus.

input_text: Kalau kau bukan anak Kelantan, jangan cuba nak buat budu. Memang takkan jadi. Bahan mentah pun kau tak kenal.

suggested_rewrite: Budu adalah warisan Kelantan yang unik. Sesiapa yang berminat boleh belajar daripada pengusaha tempatan untuk memahami proses pembuatannya.

input_text: Ish, orang pedalaman Sarawak tu. Baru keluar hutan, mana tau pasal dunia moden.
reason: Deeply condescending about indigenous Sarawakians, reducing them to a 'jungle' stereotype. Undermines their dignity and communal harmony.

input_text: Lepas ni turis Arab datang mesti sampah merata. Orang kaya tapi perangai macam tu, memang hairan.

input_text: Janji kerajaan nak turunkan harga minyak, last-last minyak naik lagi. Semua penipu belaka
reason: Sarcastic take on government fuel price promises with blanket accusation of all being liars. Dismissive and cynical.
suggested_rewrite: Kerajaan pernah berjanji turunkan harga minyak tetapi ia belum dilaksanakan. Rakyat berhak menuntut akauntabiliti.

input_text: Bilik darjah panas gila. Fan pun tak cukup. Air cond lagi la tak ada. Macam mana budak nak focus belajar?
reason: Extremely hot classrooms with insufficient fans and no AC, affecting student focus.

input_text: Haih biasa la tu, orang macam dia memang tak boleh fikir jauh. Undi pun sebab popularlah, bukan sebab pandai.
reason: Dismisses a public figure's intelligence and implies voters are shallow. Snarky and condescending tone.
suggested_rewrite: Populariti bukan jaminan kebolehan memimpin. Pengundi perlu menilai calon berdasarkan rekod dan kebolehan.

input_text: Pergi hospital kerajaan memang kena sabar. Doktor 5 minit, tunggu 5 jam. Staff semua muka tak happy macam kita yang salah datang.
reason: Broad insult to government hospital staff, characterising them all as unhappy and unwelcoming.
suggested_rewrite: Waktu menunggu di hospital kerajaan agak lama. Harap kerajaan dapat menambah kakitangan untuk perkhidmatan yang lebih baik.

input_text: Budak sekarang nak jadi YouTuber la, TikToker la. Kerja betul taknak. Generasi pemalas memang macam ni.
reason: Dismisses content creation as not real work and labels an entire generation as lazy.
suggested_rewrite: Bidang penciptaan kandungan digital semakin berkembang dan menjadi sumber pendapatan yang sah. Generasi muda meneroka peluang kerjaya yang berbeza.

input_text: Pehal la kereta Myvi ni bawak macam raja jalan. Potong kanan kiri tak signal, memang dasar Myvi driver.
reason: Stereotypes Myvi drivers as reckless. Rude generalization about a group of road users.

input_text: Menteri tu cakap nak turunkan harga rumah tapi anak dia beli condo RM2 juta. Cakap tak serupa bikin. Semua ahli politik sama je, penipu belaka.
reason: Using unverified claim about minister's child to brand all politicians as liars. Emotionally charged generalisation.

input_text: Harga tiket wayang makin naik. Dulu RM10 sekarang RM25. Hiburan pun dah jadi barang mewah.
reason: Cinema ticket prices making entertainment a luxury, cost of living indicator.

input_text: Nak guna MyKasih subsidi tepung pun tak boleh sebab system error. Orang susah yang suffer.

input_text: Nak tukar nama kat MyKad sebab salah ejaan pun kena tunggu 6 bulan. Padahal kesilapan JPN sendiri.
reason: 6-month wait to correct JPN's own spelling error on MyKad.

input_text: Condo kita ni makin teruk la sejak ramai foreign worker masuk. Bau masakan diorang tu memang tak tahan.

input_text: Nurse kat wad tu siap boleh tengok phone lagi masa pesakit panggil. Gaji makan free ke? Orang sakit nak perhatian la weh.

input_text: Sumpah tak faham kenapa website kerajaan ni macam dari era dinosaur. UX teruk gila.
reason: Comparing government website design to dinosaur era, creative frustrated tech critique.

input_text: Dah la tingkat 20 takde lift. Kena naik tangga. Penghuni OKU macam mana? Building ni memang tak ikut standard.
reason: High-floor building with no lift access, disability accessibility violation.

input_text: Nak claim kad jaminan hayat pun kena hantar surat berdaftar. Dalam zaman email ni masih nak guna pos. Outdated.

input_text: Ahli politik tu IQ dia berapa eh? Tengok jawapan dia kat parlimen rasa nak ketuk kepala sendiri.

input_text: டேட்டோ பட்டம் எல்லாம் காசு கொடுத்து வாங்கினது தான், யாருக்கும் தெரியும்
reason: Blanket accusation in Tamil that all Dato titles are bought. Dismisses legitimate awardees.
suggested_rewrite: டேட்டோ பட்டம் வழங்கும் முறையில் மேலும் வெளிப்படைத்தன்மை தேவை என்று மக்கள் கருதுகிறார்கள்.

input_text: பெண்கள் 35 வயதுக்கு மேல் திருமணம் ஆகாவிட்டால் ஏதோ குறை இருக்கு என்று நினைக்கிறார்கள். இது என்ன காலம், இன்னும் இப்படி backward thinking-ஆ இருக்காங்க
reason: Critiques societal attitudes about unmarried women but calls the thinking 'backward', which is dismissive of traditional perspectives. The frustration is valid but the approach is polarising.
suggested_rewrite: திருமணம் செய்யும் வயதை ஒவ்வொருவரும் தாங்களாகவே தீர்மானிக்க வேண்டும். சமூகம் தனிப்பட்ட தேர்வுகளை மதிக்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: Unifi technician வந்து button press பண்ணிட்டு fixed-ன்னு சொல்றான். அடுத்த நாள் same problem. Useless service.
reason: Calls Unifi service useless and dismisses technicians' work as ineffective.
suggested_rewrite: Unifi தொழில்நுட்ப சேவையின் தரம் மேம்படுத்தப்பட வேண்டும். நிரந்தர தீர்வுகள் வழங்குவது முக்கியம்.

input_text: 那个餐厅的服务态度太差了。服务员好像我们欠他钱一样。以后不会再去了。
reason: Harsh restaurant service complaint, feeling treated rudely by staff.
suggested_rewrite: 这家餐厅的服务态度需要改善。我会通过评价平台分享我的体验，希望管理层能注意到并加强员工培训。

input_text: 这些健身房签了一年合同就不让退。即使服务质量下降也不能退款。霸王条款。
reason: Gym refusing contract termination despite declining service quality, unfair terms.
suggested_rewrite: 不合理的合同条款可以向消费者法庭挑战。签约前仔细阅读条款并保留所有文件。

input_text: 公寓里的外劳每天煮那种味道很重的食物，整层楼都闻到。管理层应该限制他们。
reason: Targets foreign workers specifically for cooking smells and calls for restrictions on them rather than all residents.
suggested_rewrite: 公寓的烹饪气味问题需要通过改善通风系统来解决，相关规定应该公平地适用于所有住户。

input_text: 乡下来的人就是这样，什么都不懂，来到KL还以为自己很厉害。
reason: Condescending urban elitism mocking rural migrants to KL. Dismisses their capabilities based on geographic origin.
suggested_rewrite: 从乡下到城市生活需要一段适应期。我们应该互相帮助，而不是嘲笑别人的背景。

input_text: 公立医院的药房每次都缺药。同一个药方要跑三家药房才能配齐。
reason: Government hospital pharmacy frequently out of stock, requiring visits to multiple pharmacies.
suggested_rewrite: 医院药房的供应管理需要改善。患者可以向医院管理层反映药品短缺问题。

input_text: 每到假期医院就缺医生。平时已经不够了，假期更糟糕。患者怎么办？
reason: Hospital doctor shortage worsening during holidays, patient care concern.
suggested_rewrite: 假期期间医院人手安排需要提前规划。增加医疗人员编制是解决长期医生短缺的关键。

input_text: 学校食堂的饭菜又贵又难吃。孩子们每天吃不饱。这是什么学校管理？
reason: Frustrated about expensive low-quality school canteen food affecting children's nutrition.
suggested_rewrite: 学校食堂的质量和价格应受到监督。家长可以通过家教协会向学校管理层反映问题。

input_text: 公司裁员只裁合约工。永久员工不管多差都不会被裁。这公平吗？
reason: Layoffs targeting contract workers while protecting permanent staff regardless of performance.
suggested_rewrite: 裁员决定应基于合理标准而非雇佣类型。受影响的合约工可向劳工部咨询权利。

input_text: 听说那个部长的儿子用政府的钱出国旅行，不知道真不真。这种人当官真的是浪费纳税人的钱。
reason: Spreads an unverified rumor about a minister's son misusing public funds while treating it as likely true.
suggested_rewrite: 如果有关于公款被滥用的可靠信息，可以向反贪污委员会举报。未经证实的传闻不应随意传播。

input_text: 非马来人做的叻沙味道就是差，调味根本不对。还是别浪费材料了。
reason: Claims non-Malays cannot make proper laksa and tells them not to waste ingredients. Ethnic gatekeeping of shared Malaysian food.
suggested_rewrite: 叻沙的烹饪技巧需要时间掌握。任何人只要用心学习，都能做出美味的叻沙。

input_text: 有人转发：'印度人开的餐厅不卫生，千万不要去。' 这种话能信吗？
reason: Forwarding an ethnically stereotyping claim about Indian-run restaurants being unhygienic. Even questioning its credibility, the act of repeating it spreads the stereotype.
suggested_rewrite: 有人分享了关于某些餐厅卫生的说法。我觉得不应该以种族来判断，每家店的卫生标准不同，可以参考卫生部的评级。

input_text: 去政府部门办事真的要命，排队两个小时，到了柜台那个人还在慢慢来，急死人。
reason: Rude complaint about government counter staff being slow. Dismissive of public servants with frustrated tone.
suggested_rewrite: 在政府部门排队很久，柜台服务效率有待提高。希望能增加人手或改善流程。

input_text: 这个小区的下水道经常溢出来。臭气熏天。向市政厅投诉了好多次都没有回音。
reason: Recurring sewage overflow with no response from municipal council.
suggested_rewrite: 下水道溢出是公共健康问题。可以向环境部门和市政厅同时提交书面投诉并保留记录。

input_text: B40的人不应该生那么多孩子。养不起就不要生，害了孩子也害了社会。
reason: Dictates reproductive choices of B40 families, implying they burden society by having children.
suggested_rewrite: 家庭计划是个人选择。政府的援助计划旨在确保所有家庭都能获得必要的支持。

input_text: M40的人最可悲，赚不多花不少。买不起好车就别买啦，何必打肿脸充胖子。
reason: Pities and mocks M40 earners for their spending habits, calling them pathetic pretenders.
suggested_rewrite: M40群体面临独特的财务挑战。合理的理财规划可以帮助他们实现更好的生活品质。

input_text: 那些转发说鸡蛋要涨到十块钱一粒的人，脑子是不是进水了？不过话说回来，这些人就是喜欢制造恐慌。
reason: Insults people forwarding unverified egg price claims while also highlighting the misinformation problem.
suggested_rewrite: 关于鸡蛋价格暴涨的消息未经证实。请参考官方来源，不要转发未验证的信息。

input_text: 过路费年年涨，路况年年差。高速公路公司赚得盆满钵满，老百姓的钱就这样被吸走了。
reason: Portrays highway companies as blood-sucking entities exploiting citizens. Inflammatory rhetoric about toll increases.
suggested_rewrite: 过路费上涨应伴随道路质量的提升。公众有权了解收费的用途和公路维护计划。

input_text: 停车场收费越来越贵，服务越来越差。管理公司就是吸血鬼，只知道涨价。
reason: Calls parking management companies vampires, dehumanising language for a pricing complaint.
suggested_rewrite: 停车费涨价应该伴随服务质量的提升。消费者可以向相关部门反映不合理的收费情况。

input_text: 每次看到有人骑摩托不戴头盔出事故就说活该的，虽然不应该，但真的忍不住觉得是自己的错。
reason: Admits to victim-blaming motorcyclists not wearing helmets. Self-aware but still dismissive of victims.
suggested_rewrite: 不戴头盔骑摩托确实很危险，但出事故时我们应该表达关心而不是指责。安全教育很重要。

input_text: 这个商场的电梯经常坏。推婴儿车的妈妈怎么办？管理层只顾收租金。
reason: Mall elevator frequently broken affecting mothers with strollers, management criticism.
suggested_rewrite: 商场电梯对行动不便者和推婴儿车的家长至关重要。管理层应将电梯维修列为优先事项。

input_text: 每次下暴雨都会停电。电力公司到底在做什么？是不是故意的？
reason: Frustrated utility complaint about power outages during rain, questioning if deliberate.
suggested_rewrite: 暴雨期间频繁停电说明电力基础设施需要升级。电力公司应投资防雨设备和快速恢复系统。

input_text: 不是我要说，但是这些人来到我们的地方，连基本礼貌都没有。真的受不了。
reason: Vague reference to 'these people' with sweeping negative characterization, implying an outgroup lacks basic manners. Borderline because it could be about specific individuals or an entire group.
suggested_rewrite: 我希望大家都能互相尊重，遵守基本的社交礼仪。遇到不愉快的事可以好好沟通。

input_text: 本来以为在马来西亚退休生活会很舒适。结果物价一直涨，退休金越来越不够用。
reason: Retirement affordability concern with rising costs eroding pension value.
suggested_rewrite: 退休规划应考虑通货膨胀因素。政府可以为退休人员提供更多社会保障和医疗支援。

input_text: 这个市场的鱼贩每次都给我不新鲜的鱼。问他还生气。这种态度怎么做生意？
reason: Frustrated market vendor complaint about product quality and rude attitude.
suggested_rewrite: 消费者有权获得新鲜商品和礼貌服务。如果不满意，可以换一家购买或向市场管理处反映。

input_text: 这个停车场的收费机经常吃钱。投诉了好几次都没人修。管理层就知道收钱。
reason: Parking meter eating money with no repairs despite complaints.
suggested_rewrite: 收费机故障导致的经济损失可以向管理处要求退还。拍照留证据有助于投诉。

input_text: 学校的空调费要学生自己出。每月50块。上学都变成一种经济负担了。
reason: Students charged monthly for classroom air conditioning, hidden education cost.
suggested_rewrite: 学校设施费用应该透明且合理。如果额外收费过高，家长可以通过家教协会与学校协商。

input_text: 华小老师讲马来文那个口音真的听不下去，难怪孩子的BM成绩那么差。
reason: Mocks Chinese school teacher's Malay language pronunciation with ethnic undertone. Rude commentary on language ability.
suggested_rewrite: 华小的马来文教学质量需要提升。希望学校能聘请马来文能力更强的老师来提高学生成绩。

input_text: 这些二代移民连马来语都不会说。住在马来西亚几十年了，还是只会说自己的语言。融入社会很难吗？
reason: Criticizing second-generation immigrants for not speaking Malay, which could target Chinese or Indian Malaysians. The frustration about linguistic integration masks ethnic resentment.
suggested_rewrite: 国语能力有助于社会融合。政府可以提供更多免费语言课程，帮助所有居民更好地交流。

input_text: 每次下雨就堵车。这个城市的排水系统到底是谁设计的？完全不管用。
reason: Rain-induced traffic jams due to poor drainage, infrastructure criticism.
suggested_rewrite: 城市排水系统需要升级以应对极端天气。市政厅应优先改善低洼地区的排水基础设施。

input_text: 我姑姑分享：'晚上不要去那个马来区，很多抢劫案。' 真的假的？
reason: Forwarding a racially coded crime warning about 'the Malay area' without evidence. Asking 'real or fake?' while amplifying the ethnic association with crime.
suggested_rewrite: 姑姑说某个地区不太安全。我会查看警方的犯罪统计数据，而不是根据种族来判断一个地区的安全性。

input_text: 现在的年轻人就知道刷手机，叫他们做点正经事比登天还难
reason: Condescending generational commentary in Chinese dismissing youth as phone-obsessed and unproductive.
suggested_rewrite: 年轻一代习惯使用手机，我们可以引导他们在科技与生活之间取得平衡。

input_text: 政府办事效率真的是慢到要死。办个手续等三个月，公务员都在干嘛？喝茶聊天吗？
reason: Accuses all civil servants of idling and being inefficient, a mocking and rude characterisation.
suggested_rewrite: 行政手续的处理时间需要缩短。推行数字化服务和优化流程可以有效提升政府办事效率。

input_text: These Bangla workers are taking over the factory area. They cook smelly food, they're noisy. Residents should petition to remove them.
reason: Derogatory characterization of Bangladeshi workers' food and behavior. Calls for organized removal from a residential area based on ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: If there are genuine nuisance issues in a residential area, discuss them with the local council. Focus on specific problems, not the nationality of the residents.

input_text: Indians in Malaysia are the main reason crime rates are so high. Look at the statistics, most gangsters and drug addicts are from that community.
reason: Blames an entire ethnic group for crime using distorted statistics, promoting racial profiling and communal blame.
suggested_rewrite: Crime is a socioeconomic issue that affects all communities. Addressing poverty and access to education is more effective than racial blame.

input_text: This woman from [company name] Petaling Jaya cheated my friend RM5000. Her name is Mei Ling, works at level 3 accounts department. Everyone please share and make her viral.
reason: Name-and-shame post with specific workplace, floor, and department details. Encourages viral sharing as revenge without due process.
suggested_rewrite: If someone has cheated you financially, please lodge a police report and pursue legal channels rather than sharing personal details publicly.

input_text: The DAP is a Chinese party trying to make Malaysia a Chinese country. They want to erase Malay rights and turn us into second-class citizens.
reason: Frames a political party in purely ethnic terms and promotes the conspiracy that it seeks ethnic dominance, polarizing communities.
suggested_rewrite: Political parties should be evaluated on their policies, not reduced to ethnic labels. All parties have diverse membership.

input_text: Never trust an Indian landlord with your deposit. They'll find any excuse to keep your money when you move out.
reason: Ethnic generalisation warning against all Indian landlords as dishonest regarding deposits. Spreads unfounded mistrust.
suggested_rewrite: Protect your deposit by documenting the property's condition at move-in and having clear written agreements, regardless of who the landlord is.

input_text: These people come to our country and build their temples everywhere. Soon there will be more temples than mosques. This is a Muslim country.
reason: Frames minority religious buildings as a threat to Islamic dominance, hostile rhetoric against religious pluralism in Malaysia.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia respects freedom of worship as enshrined in the Constitution. Planning for religious buildings should follow local authority guidelines.

input_text: The whole Malay special rights thing is just legalized racism. This country will never progress as long as one group gets handouts.
reason: Dismisses constitutional provisions as racism and labels affirmative action as handouts, inflammatory framing of a sensitive constitutional matter.
suggested_rewrite: There are ongoing debates about how affirmative action policies can be improved. These discussions should respect the constitutional framework while exploring reforms.

input_text: Every time there's an economic crisis, the Malays suffer while the Chinese businesses somehow always bounce back. It's obvious they're rigging the system.
reason: Promotes the conspiracy that Chinese Malaysians rig the economic system, scapegoating an ethnic group during economic hardship.
suggested_rewrite: Economic resilience varies across sectors and communities. Understanding structural factors can help develop better support systems for all Malaysians during downturns.

input_text: Every time there's a water shortage in Selangor, it's because the Tamil estate workers upstream are polluting the rivers. Their communities are filthy.
reason: Falsely blames water shortages on Tamil estate worker communities and labels them as filthy, spreading ethnic misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: Water shortages in Selangor are caused by multiple factors including infrastructure and treatment plant issues. Blaming specific communities is inaccurate.

input_text: This area near the temple is supposed to be for our community. Non-Hindus should stay away during festivals.
reason: Claims exclusive community ownership of public areas near places of worship. Hostile gatekeeping that excludes others from shared spaces during festivals.
suggested_rewrite: Festivals are a wonderful time for communities. While respecting religious customs, public areas around temples remain open to all.

input_text: Shared a fake news article about Chinese Malaysians smuggling drugs for triads. If you believe these people are loyal to Malaysia, you're delusional. They only care about money.
reason: Admits to sharing fake news to paint Chinese Malaysians as disloyal drug smugglers. Deliberately spreads misinformation to incite ethnic distrust.
suggested_rewrite: Sharing unverified news is harmful. Drug trafficking is a criminal issue handled by authorities. Let's not stereotype any community based on the actions of individuals.

input_text: These LGBT people are getting too bold in Malaysia. Time to hunt them down one by one and teach them a lesson they won't forget.
reason: Directly threatens to hunt down LGBTQ individuals and inflict punishment, constituting violent incitement and vigilantism.
suggested_rewrite: All Malaysians are protected by law regardless of personal identity. Concerns should be raised through legal channels, not threats.

input_text: The Kadazan people want more autonomy? Go ahead, leave Malaysia then. We don't need Sabah anyway. Let them fend for themselves without our federal money.
reason: Dismisses Kadazan autonomy aspirations with hostility and threatens economic abandonment, deepening West-East Malaysia divisions.
suggested_rewrite: Discussions about state autonomy within Malaysia's federal framework are legitimate constitutional conversations. They should be approached with mutual respect and understanding of historical agreements.

input_text: Medical supplies sent to East Malaysia are always expired because nobody cares about the Sabah Sarawak people. The government treats them like second-class citizens deliberately.
reason: Spreads unverified claims about deliberately sending expired medical supplies to East Malaysia, framing it as intentional government neglect to inflame regional tensions.
suggested_rewrite: Healthcare access in Sabah and Sarawak needs improvement. Advocacy for better medical supply chains should be directed at the Health Ministry through proper channels.

input_text: These human rights lawyers defending LGBTQ people should be disbarred. Let's mass report their law firm pages and ruin their reputation online.
reason: Targets lawyers for providing legal defence, attempting to destroy professional reputations through coordinated mass-reporting.
suggested_rewrite: Lawyers have a professional duty to represent all clients. Attacking them for doing their job undermines the justice system.

input_text: Indians always play the race card when they don't get what they want. Stop crying discrimination — you people just aren't qualified enough.
reason: Dismisses racial discrimination concerns of the Indian community as fabricated while implying they lack qualifications, combining gaslighting with ethnic stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: Discrimination claims should be evaluated on their merits. Dismissing entire communities' experiences prevents genuine dialogue about equality and inclusion.

input_text: Indian women from estates are so uneducated and uncouth. They don't belong in proper society. Should just stay in the kampung where they came from.
reason: Class-based and gendered ethnic attack on Indian women from plantation backgrounds. Dehumanizes and excludes them from mainstream society.
suggested_rewrite: Every Malaysian deserves respect and access to opportunities regardless of their background. Socioeconomic challenges should be addressed through inclusive policies, not discrimination.

input_text: Eh you know ah the teacher that kena caught with student? She's from [school name] in Seremban. Her husband also teacher at the same school. Let's make sure whole Seremban knows.
reason: Spreads identifying details about a teacher involved in alleged misconduct, including school and spouse. Doxxing campaign for public humiliation.
suggested_rewrite: Allegations of teacher misconduct should be reported to the school administration and education department. Spreading personal details is harmful.

input_text: Matrikulasi program is a waste when given to non-Malays. They already dominate private sector. Education should remain exclusively for Bumiputera advancement.
reason: Argues non-Malay matriculation students are a waste and education should be exclusively for Bumiputera, using private sector dominance myth to justify educational segregation.
suggested_rewrite: Matriculation programs serve various national goals. Educational access should be discussed based on policy objectives and student needs, not ethnic exclusion.

input_text: All Malay youths these days are lazy and entitled. That's why the country can't progress. They expect everything to be given to them.
reason: Racist stereotype of Malay youth as lazy and entitled, harmful generalization.
suggested_rewrite: Generalizing any racial group as lazy is unfair and divisive. Many Malay youth are hardworking entrepreneurs, professionals, and community leaders.

input_text: Every year sure got one Chinese towkay kena caught for environmental crime but nothing happens because they pay off the authorities. Only Malay businesses kena penalise.
reason: Claims Chinese business owners bribe authorities to avoid environmental penalties while only Malays are punished. Ethnic conspiracy with misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: Environmental enforcement should apply equally to all businesses. Report suspected corruption to MACC for proper investigation.

input_text: Their wedding customs are so wasteful and show-off. No wonder they're always in debt. Culture of excess.
reason: Demeans an entire community's cultural practices as wasteful and links it to negative financial stereotypes.
suggested_rewrite: Wedding expenses are a personal choice. Financial literacy is important for everyone regardless of cultural background.

input_text: Every time a Chinese business opens in our area, property prices go up and locals get pushed out. We need to stop them from expanding here.
reason: Scapegoating Chinese business owners for economic pressures and calling for exclusionary action against their business activities.
suggested_rewrite: Property price increases are driven by many market factors. Blaming any single ethnic group oversimplifies a complex economic issue.

input_text: Indian supervisors in this factory always give overtime to their own kind and leave Malay workers with basic salary only. Gather the boys, we'll confront them tonight after shift.
reason: Plans group confrontation of supervisors based on ethnic grievance, with threatening implications of after-hours intimidation.
suggested_rewrite: Unfair overtime distribution should be reported to HR and the Labour Department. Document the pattern and file a formal complaint.

input_text: Malay privilege is a joke. They get everything on a silver platter — scholarships, contracts, housing discounts — and still can't compete. What does that tell you?
reason: Mocks Malay affirmative action policies in a way that implies racial inferiority, provocatively suggesting Malays cannot succeed despite advantages.
suggested_rewrite: Affirmative action policies can be discussed constructively by evaluating their effectiveness and suggesting reforms, without implying any group is inherently less capable.

input_text: Tamil women are so loud and aggressive. No wonder they can't keep a husband. Even their own men prefer Malay or Chinese women.
reason: Gendered ethnic stereotyping of Tamil women as aggressive and undesirable. Promotes inter-ethnic comparison in a degrading manner.
suggested_rewrite: Personality traits are individual characteristics, not ethnic ones. It is harmful to generalize any community based on stereotypes.

input_text: Pendatang children taking up spaces in our public universities while Bumiputera kids can't get in. This country is going to the dogs. Revoke their scholarship rights!
reason: Uses pendatang label to argue for stripping educational rights from minority citizens, ignoring merit-based admission principles.
suggested_rewrite: University admissions should balance merit with equitable access. Education policy reforms can be discussed constructively without targeting any community.

input_text: Warning to all Muslim parents: Christian missionaries are targeting young Malay girls through romantic relationships. They seduce, marry, and convert. Stay vigilant!
reason: Spreads conspiracy about Christian missionaries using romance for conversion, fearmongering without evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Parents can strengthen their children's faith through education and open dialogue. Interfaith relationships are governed by clear legal frameworks in Malaysia.

input_text: Let's all give 1-star reviews to that shop in Bangsar. The owner insulted our community and we need to teach him a lesson.
reason: Organizes coordinated review bombing of a business as ethnic retaliation. Vigilante mob action disguised as consumer feedback.
suggested_rewrite: If a business owner made offensive remarks, file a formal complaint with the relevant authorities instead of coordinated retaliation.

input_text: YB XXXX has been laundering money through his wife's company. I have screenshots of the bank transfers. Who wants to organize a protest outside his house?
